method_summary: Implementation of Speculative Tool Privacy Contracts as a runtime abstraction to handle observation before commitment as a first-class effect, distinct from state mutation.
key_innovation: Issue-time privacy policies that change or suppress speculative call arguments or destination projections before dispatch to reduce observer inference.
limitations_stated: access-control allow-list unsends what an observer already holds
title: Ghost Tool Calls: Issue-Time Privacy for Speculative Agent Tools
